author: gemini-code-assist
description: Supabase Realtime event schema for SLATE. Desktop app and web portal both subscribe to these channels.

clip:{clipId}.description: Per-clip channel. Subscribe when a clip is open for review or proxy generation is in progress.

annotation_added.description: A new annotation was posted on this clip.

review_status_changed.description: The clip's reviewStatus was updated (circled, flagged, x, etc.).

proxy_status_changed.description: Proxy generation status changed. Emitted by desktop ingest daemon.

ai_scores_ready.description: AI scoring pipeline completed. Web portal should refresh scores panel.

sync_result_updated.description: Audio sync result was computed or manually overridden.

project:{projectId}.description: Project-wide channel. Subscribe to get updates across all clips in a project.

clip_ingested.description: A new clip was ingested and written to the database.

payload.clip: Clip (see contracts/data-model.json, aiScores and annotations will be empty)

clip_proxy_ready.description: Proxy generation completed for a clip. Use to refresh thumbnails.

assembly_updated.description: An assembly was created or modified.

share_link_created.description: A new share link was generated for this project.

ingest:{projectId}.description: Ingest progress channel. Subscribe from web portal to show live ingest status.

progress_update.description: Periodic ingest progress broadcast from desktop daemon.

subscriptionNotes.desktop: Subscribe to project:{projectId} and clip:{clipId} channels via Supabase Swift client
subscriptionNotes.webPortal: Subscribe to clip:{clipId} channel for review page; project:{projectId} for dashboard
subscriptionNotes.authentication: Pass Supabase JWT (internal users) or X-Share-Token header (external reviewers)
